# PERF-030 negative: the goroutine inherits the request context
lang: go
file: PERF-030-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func Forward(c *gin.Context) {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	wg.Add(1)
	ctx := c.Request.Context()
	go func() {
		_ = ctx
		wg.Done()
	}()
	wg.Wait()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
}
